aws.name: GuardDuty enabled in all regions
aws.expected: GuardDuty detector enabled in all active regions
aws.remediation: Enable Amazon GuardDuty in all active regions.

aws.name: Security Hub enabled with automated findings
aws.expected: Security Hub enabled and receiving findings from integrated services
aws.remediation: Enable AWS Security Hub and integrate GuardDuty, Inspector, and Macie.

aws.name: EventBridge rules for security events
aws.expected: EventBridge rules configured to route security findings to response team
aws.remediation: Create EventBridge rules to route GuardDuty/Security Hub findings to SNS/Lambda.

aws.name: IR playbooks documented in SSM Automation
aws.expected: SSM Automation documents exist for common IR scenarios
aws.remediation: Create SSM Automation runbooks for incident response playbooks.

azure.name: Microsoft Defender for Cloud enabled
azure.expected: Defender plans enabled for all resource types
azure.remediation: Enable Microsoft Defender for Cloud on all resource types.

azure.name: Microsoft Sentinel deployed
azure.expected: Sentinel workspace deployed with data connectors configured
azure.remediation: Deploy Microsoft Sentinel and configure relevant data connectors.

azure.name: Sentinel automation rules configured
azure.expected: Automation rules configured for incident triage and response
azure.remediation: Create Sentinel automation rules and playbooks for common incident types.

gcp.name: Security Command Center Premium enabled
gcp.expected: SCC Premium tier enabled with threat detection active
gcp.remediation: Enable Security Command Center Premium for threat detection capabilities.

gcp.name: Event Threat Detection enabled
gcp.expected: Event Threat Detection module active in SCC
gcp.remediation: Enable Event Threat Detection in Security Command Center.

gcp.name: Pub/Sub notifications for SCC findings
gcp.expected: Notification configs route critical findings to Pub/Sub
gcp.remediation: Configure SCC notification channels to Pub/Sub for automated response.

3.6.2.manual_guidance: Review incident tracking system and reporting procedures. Verify incident reports include required data elements (timeline, impact, root cause, corrective actions). Confirm incidents are reported to designated officials within required timeframes. Verify external reporting procedures to CISA/DoD CIO as required for CUI incidents.
evidence_requests: Incident tracking system access or exports
Incident reporting procedures and escalation matrix
Sample incident reports from past 12 months

objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: incidents are tracked.
Provide documentation or process evidence: incidents are documented.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: authorities to whom incidents are to be reported are identified.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that authorities to whom incidents are to be reported are identified and documented.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: organizational officials to whom incidents are to be reported are identified.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation showing that organizational officials to whom incidents are to be reported are identified and documented.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: identified authorities are notified of incidents.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: identified authorities are notified of incidents.

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: identified organizational officials are notified of incidents.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: identified organizational officials are notified of incidents.

3.6.3.manual_guidance: Request records of incident response tests and tabletop exercises. Verify testing occurs at least annually and includes realistic scenarios involving CUI compromise. Check that test results are documented with lessons learned and the IR plan is updated based on findings.
evidence_requests: Tabletop exercise scenarios and after-action reports
IR plan update history based on test findings

objectives_requiring_documentation.text: the incident response capability is tested.
objectives_requiring_documentation.evidence_needed: Provide documentation or process evidence: the incident response capability is tested.
